title: Mob Numerical Indicator
description: This mod displays real-time health, armor, and oxygen indicators on mobs.
body:
![Mob Numerical Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed7d3ee9b3506acab6c71a09be88fb8b55e2941c.png)
FEATURES
Health IndicatorDisplays a heart icon with a number showing the mob's current HP
Armor IndicatorDisplays an armor icon and the mob's current armor value
Oxygen IndicatorDisplays an air bubble icon and remaining air time in seconds
Damage & Heal IndicatorsBriefly displays how much HP was lost or gained whenever a mob takes damage or is healed
Effect IndicatorsDisplays active status effect icons and remaining duration in seconds
CONFIGURATION
If you have Mod Menu installed, you can customize your experience:
Show AlwaysShow indicators on all nearby mobs at all times
Show When AggressiveShow indicators when a mob is targeting something
Show When DamagedShow indicators when a mob is below full health
Show When Looked AtShow indicators when your crosshair is over the mob
Show When InvisibleShow indicators on invisible mobs
Show Armor At ZeroShow the armor indicator when no armor is worn
Show Text ShadowShow a drop shadow behind all indicator text
Scale (%)Baseline size of icons and text
Max Distance (blocks)How far away indicators remain visible
Y OffsetAdjusts the vertical position of the indicators
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API - Cloth Config API (1.21.x) - YetAnotherConfigLib (26.x) - Mod Menu (recommended for easy in-game configuration)
CLIENT-SIDE ONLY
All functionality is done client-side and is compatible with vanilla servers.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
